channel.title: +Articles on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Unimportance
item.description: Source: TW It’s important to not conflate related but distinct issues (let alone totally unrelated issues) into a single issue and get emotionally worked up over its political implications: Genetic/geographical origin of “Āryas” & alleged foreignness of the Vedic religion are conceptually distinct issues. I have no interest in the former issue but understand where people are coming from when they take certain positions but a position on the former does not lead to the latter.
